instruction: Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.
input: Tenda AC18 V15.03.05.19 was discovered to contain a stack overflow via the limitSpeedUp parameter in the formSetClientState function.
output: The Tenda AC18 router, version V15.03.05.19, contains a stack overflow vulnerability in the formSetClientState function through the limitSpeedUp parameter.
